title: January 3
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}

'''January 3''' is the third day of the calendar year. 362 days (363 in leap years) remain in the year.</noinclude>

*[[1960s#1966|1966]] – [[Shin-Ichi Hiromoto]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Angelique Perrin]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Dario Cioni]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[Jason Marsden]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 48|''Star Wars Weekly'' 48]] published.
*[[1995]] – [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 6|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 6]] published.
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars Insider 47|''Star Wars Insider'' 47]] is published.
*[[2001]] – [[Cherriielle]] is born.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' published.
*2003 – [[Star Wars Insider 65|''Star Wars Insider'' 65]] is released for subscribers.
*[[2017]] – The [[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story (novelization)|novelization]] of the film ''[[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story]]'' published in hardcover.
*2017 – ''[[The Phantom Menace Read-Along Storybook and CD]]'' published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars: Han Solo (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: Han Solo'' trade paperback]] published.
*2017 – ''[[Star Wars: I Am a Stormtrooper]]'' published.
*2017 – ''[[Rey to the Rescue!]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 41|''Star Wars'' (2015) 41]] published.
*2018 – ''[[Forces of Destiny—Leia]]'' published.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Tales from the Rancor Pit]]'' published in bookstores.
*2023 – ''[[The High Republic: The Battle of Jedha]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[The Book of Boba Fett Junior Novel]]'' published.
*[[2024]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 42|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 42]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic – Shadows of Starlight 4|''The High Republic – Shadows of Starlight'' 4]] published.
